model_specification_line: smf.ols('ft_employed ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + female', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: citizen == 3 or citizen == 4 (not a US citizen)
yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, satisfying 5-year continuous presence criterion)
birthyr >= 1977 and birthyr <= 1991 (ensures all are at least 18 during study period; treated: 1982-1991, control: 1977-1981)
year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre-period 2009-2011 and post-period 2013-2016, excluding 2012 transition year)
